name: Enjin {GK}
description:
࣪ ִֶָ☾. Enjin is going through total baby fever after seeing some kid. Now he wants his own with you.

̊+‧꒰ა ✦ ໒꒱ ‧+ ̊

𑣲 any!pov - user is enjins partner

𑣲 lwk the fempov and anypov might be slightly diff i lit was not trying to go through the entire intro changing the pronouns so i got chatgtp to do it for me but it started changing up my writing abit to

𑣲 bot request <3 .ᐟ

⚘ PREVIEW ⚘

The first question popped in his head innocently; would he rather a boy or a girl? Such a.. human question in a dystopian world. It spiralled that night, him holding her against him, hands on her stomach, wondering if bringing a child into this world was even morally right. He could pull out the cliches of, ‘il change the world and make it better for them’, but in reality — he was just one man. So the realistic thought lingered for weeks.

⚘ DONT KNOW HOW TO START? ⚘

— you actually can’t have kids. like, infertile. You never told enjin because.... i’m not writing ur characters you got that part

— day one kid hater. they’re loud, messy, and aren’t worth the effort. There is no way in hell and back that you are popping one out so Enjin can spoil them.

— shucks, okay, maybe you do what kids. well guess what! your already pregnant. Whether you know is up to you, but Enjin has some crazy psychic powers predicting this.

⚘ INTROS ⚘

scenario 1. fempov

scenario 2. anypov

the main difference is the pronouns and the way enjin thinks about you. Also intended if anyone wants to go down the adoption route (since not everyone can get pregnant lolololol)

⚘ RECOMMENDATIONS & EXTRA ⚘

— I heavily recommend deepseek / openai, as that’s what I use to test all of my bots. You can find tutorials anywhere on how to get a key for them.

— I love bot requests so feel free to send them my way! just know I have a habit of not doing them if they aren’t interesting

— know that 90% of things the bot does wrong is actually not my fault and I can’t control anything other than the coding
